mapper.select: SELECT ROLE_NAME FROM AUTHORITIES WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo}
SELECT * FROM USERS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND USER_PWD = #{userPwd}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USERS (USER_NO, USER_ID, USER_NAME, USER_PWD, EMAIL, NICKNAME, BIRTH, ADDR, PHONE, GENDER, ENROLL_DATE, STATUS) VALUES (SEQ_USER_NO.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{userPwd}, #{email}, #{nickname}, #{birth}, #{addr}, #{phone}, #{gender}, SYSDATE, 'T')
mapper.update: UPDATE USERS SET USER_NAME = #{userName}, EMAIL = #{email}, NICKNAME = #{nickname}, BIRTH = #{birth}, ADDR = #{addr}, PHONE = #{phone}, GENDER = #{gender}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, USER_PWD = #{userPwd} WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM USERS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE USERS SET USER_PWD = 'new_password' WHERE USER_ID = 'user_id_to_update'
